title: sarothamnus arboreus subsp. catalaunicus
intro: Sarothamnus arboreus subsp. catalaunicus, also known as the Catalan broom or Spanish broom, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the pea family (Fabaceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to offer health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving circulation, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Sarothamnus arboreus subsp. catalaunicus can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to treat various health conditions, including respiratory issues and digestive problems.
